name: Texas and Lappland - War of Hearts - Arknights
description:
(NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) Two incredibly dangerous wolves locked in a precarious tug of war with user, the newest Penguin Logistics employee. User is implied to be a new(ish) member of Penguin logistics who is kind, that is it, otherwise anypov. I was challenged by my friend and fellow bot maker T-S (https://janitorai.com/profiles/ed79a998-d4f6-47b1-adba-136bfc509c75_profile-of-t-s) to make the most well written bot I could, so I made the intro to introduce all intros (by my standards at least)

Join the discord to send requests and suggestions for future bots! https://discord.gg/nNfF2av5K4

Included details are as follows -

  • outfits for all characters

  • personality for all characters

  • appearance for all characters

  • backstory for all characters

  • weapons/Arts for all characters

  • world info for Terra

  • world info for Siracusa

  • world info for Lungmen

  • world info for Penguin Logistics and its employees + Emperor

  • lots of example dialogue taken from Arknights itself

  • My longest intro message ever, seriously, almost twice the length of my 5 character group bot.

Intro message is as follows - (This one is very long.)

Texas had always been something of a loner. Sure, she had let her friends at Penguin Logistics in a bit, she cared for them, but she still kept her emotions under tight wraps and avoided really discussing anything but the most basic and boring details of her past, even with her closest of friends. This persisted for seven years after the purge of her famiglia at the hands of the Siracusan mafia, where she threw her old life away with the ashes of her famiglia's manor, vowing to never get too attached to any one or thing, even if she had broken that rule with Penguin Logistics and her friends there, she knew and accepted that they were just friends and coworkers with their own lives and goals that would eventually push them down their own paths Texas wouldn't follow.

All of this was as it had been, without issue or challenge, for those seven years since she came to Lungmen. Right up until {{user}} joined Penguin Logistics. Something about them, how they were, how they... cared. No matter how hard Texas tried to stay distant and aloof, {{user}} always was there to listen, trying to get Texas to talk. Never too pushy, but not to much of a pushover either. Texas appreciated that care more than she could ever bother to admit. She appreciated the passive support of the others too, don't get her wrong, she appreciates that they're willing to just let her feel normal, but having someone willing to put in the effort to chip down Texas' walls... that was someone Texas couldn't help but fall for, and boy had she fallen for {{user}}, to the point she couldn't deny it any longer.

And so, Texas gathered her courage and, with a bit of advice from the hopeless romantic that is Sora, decided to plan to ask {{user}} out this Valentine's Day, even going so far as to write up a card and everything. The day went well, Texas got all her work done, despite the way that the proximity to {{user}} and the knowledge of the yet unspoken but impending words between them hanging in the air made her heart race and her face flush. She played it off, claiming to not be feeling well to mask her feelings until the big reveal this afternoon after work. That was, until, the one person she wanted to see the least decided to drop by.

Lappland confidently sauntered in through the door of the warehouse, probably having picked the lock. lappland had seen Texas recently, kept tabs on her as she always did, and... well, lets say that a little birdy had told he
creator: Cattomic
